lignes.texte: bakabt.me (don't register, search "bakabt + name" with google)
lignes.texte_balise: bakabt.me (don't register, search "bakabt + name" with google)

lignes.texte: Use it for old, non licensed anime/manga etc.
lignes.texte_balise: Use it for old, non licensed anime/manga etc.

lignes.texte: Use it for airing, new, licensed anime/manga etc.
lignes.texte_balise: Use it for airing, new, licensed anime/manga etc.

lignes.texte: Download ccop + madvr (if your pc handles it) on windows, mpv player on mac for anime.
lignes.texte_balise: Download ccop + madvr (if your pc handles it) on windows, mpv player on mac for anime.

lignes.texte: If you can't find what you're looking for try using the japanese name.
lignes.texte_balise: If you can't find what you're looking for try using the japanese name.

lignes.texte: mangaupdates.com (they removed the website links from the groups' pages, there's a script that adds them again, search the archive for it)
lignes.texte_balise: mangaupdates.com (they removed the website links from the groups' pages, there's a script that adds them again, search the archive for it)

lignes.texte: Don't be that fag that extracts the archive and watches the pictures with windows image viewer.
lignes.texte_balise: Don't be that fag that extracts the archive and watches the pictures with windows image viewer.

lignes.texte: There are other sources, don't he a far search in the archive lurk more and voulll easily find them.
lignes.texte_balise: There are other sources, don't he a far search in the archive lurk more and voulll easily find them.

lignes.texte: Use it to know what groud scanlates what manga if vou can't find it on bakabt and download it directly from their cite
